title: Amtech J1932 Glue Gun Sticks for Hot Melt Crafting, Decorating and Bonding, 10 Pieces, 11mm x 200mm, Multi-Colour, 11 x 200 mm
features: QUICK-SETTING: This 10-piece set of 11mm x 200mm hot melt glue sticks uses quick setting translucent EVA glue
MANY USES: ideal for crafting, decorating and bonding objects, as well as for vehicle dent repairs
COMPATIBLE: The sticks are compatible with Amtech's S1845 and S1850 glue guns and the Amtech J1930 dent repair kit
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
WIDE APPLICATION: Useful for a range of repair, assembly, and maintenance jobs
description: Product Description Amtech has a fantastic range of hobby and craft tools and accessories to meet all your creative requirements cost effectively. A selection of Glue stick sizes and quantities are available for hot melt crafting, decorating and bonding objects. Amtech’s great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
